---
title: "ETH: METHOD III PROJECT"
date: "2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

# DATA
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

rm(list=ls())

url_data <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SimonLabarthe/Method-3/main/data.csv"
data <- read.csv(url_data) 

data_more_balanced_3 <- data %>% 
  filter(points_gap <= 3)

data_more_balanced_2 <- data %>% 
  filter(points_gap <= 2)

data_more_balanced_1 <- data %>% 
  filter(points_gap <= 1)
```

# CODE
## Covariates Visualization P-Value
```{r}
# datasets to test
datasets <- c("data_more_balanced_3", "data_more_balanced_2", "data_more_balanced_1")

# Covariates
vars <- c("bicc_milper", 
          "bicc_milexp", 
          "bicc_gmi", 
          "wdi_expmil", 
          "wdi_pop", 
          "wdi_popurb", 
          "wdi_birth", 
          "wdi_death", 
          "wdi_mortinf", 
          "wdi_lifexp", 
          "wpp_medianage", 
          "wpp_sexratio", 
          "wdi_export",
          "wdi_import", 
          "wdi_gdpcapcon2015", 
          "wdi_gdpgr", 
          "wdi_area", 
          "vdem_polyarchy", 
          "ht_colonial", 
          "atop_number",
          "v2paseatshare")

better_names <- c(
  "Military Personnel Index",
  "Military Expenditure Index", 
  "Global Militarization Index", 
  "Military Expenditure (% of GDP)",
  "Total Population",
  "Urban Population",
  "Birth Rate",
  "Death Rate",
  "Infant Mortality",
  "Life Expectancy",
  "Median Age",
  "Sex Ratio",
  "Exports (% of GDP)",
  "Imports (% of GDP)",
  "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US dollar)",
  "GDP growth (annual %)",
  "Land Area (sq km)",
  "Democracy Level (VDEM)",
   "Colonial Origin",
  "Number of Alliances",
  "Nationalism Seat Share"
)

for(d in datasets) {
  data_current <- get(d)
  balance_p <- rep(NA, length(vars))

  for(i in seq_along(vars)){
    temp_mod <- lm(
      as.formula(paste(vars[i], "~ treatment")),
      data = data_current[, c(vars[i], "treatment")]
    )
    balance_p[i] <- summary(temp_mod)$coefficients[2, 4]
  }
  
  # Créer le dataframe pour le graphique
  df <- data.frame(vars = vars, balance_p = balance_p, better_names = better_names)
  df$y <- rank(-df$balance_p)
  
  # Afficher les p-values dans la console
  cat("\n========== Dataset:", d, "==========\n")
  print(data.frame(Variable = better_names, P_value = round(balance_p, 4)))
  
  # Créer le graphique
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = balance_p, y = y)) +
    geom_point(size = 2, color = "darkblue") +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limit = c(-0.01, 1.01), breaks = c(0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1)) +
    xlab(expression(paste(italic("p"), "-value", sep = ""))) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = df$y, labels = df$better_names) +
    ylab(NULL) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, lty = 2, color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.10, lty = 2, color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8) +
    labs(title = paste("Balance Test P-Values -", d),
         subtitle = "Vertical lines: p=0.05 (red) and p=0.10 (orange)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.15, linetype = "dashed"))
  
  # Afficher le graphique
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(paste0("balance_plot_", d, ".pdf"), p, width = 10, height = 8)
}
```

## Covariates Visualization Mean Comparison
```{r}
# Covariates
balance_results <- list()

for (d in datasets) { 
  data_current <- get(d)
  
  balance_table <- data.frame(
    variable = better_names,
    control_mean = NA,
    treatment_mean = NA
    )


  for (i in seq_along(vars)) {
    v <- vars[i]
    balance_table$treatment_mean[i] <- mean(data_current[[v]][data_current$treatment == 1], na.rm = TRUE)
    balance_table$control_mean[i] <- mean(data_current[[v]][data_current$treatment == 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  balance_table <- balance_table %>%
    mutate(
      difference = treatment_mean - control_mean,
      treatment_mean = round(treatment_mean, 2),
      control_mean = round(control_mean, 2),
      difference = round(difference, 2)
    )

    balance_results[[d]] <- balance_table
 
}

balance_results[["data_more_balanced_1"]]
balance_results[["data_more_balanced_2"]]
balance_results[["data_more_balanced_3"]]
```

```{r}
## Figure 2: Balance Table — data_more_balanced_1
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)

# ---- 0. Config ----
data_current <- data_more_balanced_1

vars <- c("bicc_milper", "bicc_milexp", "bicc_gmi", "wdi_expmil",
          "wdi_pop", "wdi_popurb", "wdi_birth", "wdi_death", "wdi_mortinf",
          "wdi_lifexp", "wpp_medianage", "wpp_sexratio", "wdi_export",
          "wdi_import", "wdi_gdpcapcon2015", "wdi_gdpgr", "wdi_area",
          "vdem_polyarchy", "ht_colonial", "atop_number", "v2paseatshare")

better_names <- c(
  "Military Personnel Index", "Military Expenditure Index",
  "Global Militarization Index", "Military Expenditure (% GDP)",
  "Total Population", "Urban Population", "Birth Rate", "Death Rate",
  "Infant Mortality", "Life Expectancy", "Median Age", "Sex Ratio",
  "Exports (% GDP)", "Imports (% GDP)",
  "GDP per capita (2015 USD)", "GDP growth (%)",
  "Land Area (sq km)", "Democracy Level (VDEM)",
  "Colonial Origin", "Number of Alliances", "Nationalism Seat Share"
)

# ---- 1. Compute means & paired t-test p-values ----
# Pair qualifier vs non-qualifier within the same group × year
results <- lapply(seq_along(vars), function(i) {
  v <- vars[i]
  
  qual <- data_current %>%
    filter(treatment == 1) %>%
    select(year, group_name, val = all_of(v)) %>%
    arrange(year, group_name)
  
  nonq <- data_current %>%
    filter(treatment == 0) %>%
    select(year, group_name, val = all_of(v)) %>%
    arrange(year, group_name)
  
  # Keep only groups that have both a qualifier and non-qualifier
  paired <- inner_join(qual, nonq, by = c("year", "group_name"),
                       suffix = c("_q", "_nq"))
  
  p_val <- tryCatch(
    t.test(paired$val_q, paired$val_nq, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
  
  data.frame(
    var_name     = better_names[i],
    q_mean       = mean(data_current[[v]][data_current$treatment == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    nq_mean      = mean(data_current[[v]][data_current$treatment == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    p_value      = p_val
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

# Sort: highest p-value at top (most balanced variables at top, like the reference)
results <- results %>%
  arrange(desc(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(y_pos = row_number())

n <- nrow(results)

# ---- 2. Smart number formatter ----
fmt_num <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) | is.nan(x)) return("NA")
  if (abs(x) >= 1e9)  return(formatC(round(x / 1e9, 2), format = "f", digits = 2, big.mark = ","))
  if (abs(x) >= 1e6)  return(format(round(x), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))
  if (abs(x) >= 1e3)  return(format(round(x), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))
  if (abs(x) >= 1)    return(as.character(round(x, 2)))
  return(as.character(round(x, 2)))
}

results <- results %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(q_fmt  = fmt_num(q_mean),
         nq_fmt = fmt_num(nq_mean)) %>%
  ungroup()

# ---- 3. Row shading helper ----
shade_df <- results %>% filter(y_pos %% 2 == 0)

# ---- 4. LEFT PANEL: table with variable names + means ----
p_left <- ggplot(results, aes(y = y_pos)) +
  # Alternating row shading
  geom_rect(data = shade_df,
            aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = y_pos - 0.5, ymax = y_pos + 0.5),
            fill = "grey92", color = NA, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # Variable names
  geom_text(aes(x = 0,   label = var_name), hjust = 1, size = 2.7) +
  # Qualifier mean
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.8, label = q_fmt),    hjust = 1, size = 2.7) +
  # Non-qualifier mean
  geom_text(aes(x = 3.4, label = nq_fmt),   hjust = 1, size = 2.7) +
  # Column headers
  annotate("text", x = 0,   y = n + 1.2, label = "Variable\nName",        hjust = 1, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 1.8, y = n + 1.2, label = "Qualifier\nMean",       hjust = 1, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 3.4, y = n + 1.2, label = "Non-qualifier\nMean",   hjust = 1, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, n + 2), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-9.5, 3.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 0, b = 10, l = 5))

# ---- 5. RIGHT PANEL: dot plot ----
p_right <- ggplot(results, aes(x = p_value, y = y_pos)) +
  # Alternating row shading (must match left panel)
  geom_rect(data = shade_df,
            aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = y_pos - 0.5, ymax = y_pos + 0.5),
            fill = "grey92", color = NA, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # Dotted reference lines
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.55, color = "grey30") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.10, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.55, color = "grey30") +
  # Dots
  geom_point(size = 2.2, shape = 18) +   # shape 18 = filled diamond, like the reference
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.05, 0.1, 1),
    labels = c("0.05", "0.1", "1"),
    limits = c(0, 1.05),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, n + 2), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = expression(italic(p) * "-value")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y   = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.15, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70"),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0)
  )

# ---- 6. Title + note ----
title_grob <- ggdraw() +
  draw_label("Figure 2: Balance Between the Qualifiers and Non-qualifiers",
             fontface = "bold", x = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 11)

note_grob <- ggdraw() +
  draw_label("Notes: p-values are computed using two-tailed paired t-tests.",
             fontface = "italic", x = 0.12, hjust = 0, size = 8.5)

# ---- 7. Assemble ----
main <- plot_grid(p_left, p_right, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1.4, 1))

figure2 <- plot_grid(
  title_grob, main, note_grob,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(0.06, 1, 0.06)
)

print(figure2)
ggsave("figure2_balance_mb1.pdf", figure2, width = 13, height = 10)
```

## RDD Visualization
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

#data1 <- data_more_balanced_3
#data1 <- data_more_balanced_2
data1 <- data_more_balanced_1

dv_vars <- c("bicc_milper", "bicc_milexp", "bicc_gmi", "wdi_expmil", "v2paseatshare")

dv_labels <- c(
  "bicc_milper"   = "Military Personnel Index",
  "bicc_milexp"   = "Military Expenditure Index",
  "bicc_gmi"      = "Global Militarization Index",
  "wdi_expmil"    = "Military Expenditure (% of GDP)",
  "v2paseatshare" = "Nationalist Seat Share"
)

years_offset <- c(-5, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, 5)

year_labels <- c(
  "-5" = "5 Years Before",
  "-3" = "3 Years Before",
  "-1" = "1 Year Before",
   "0" = "World Cup Year",
   "1" = "1 Year After",
   "3" = "3 Years After",
   "5" = "5 Years After"
)

data1 <- data1 %>% arrange(country_code, year)

for (v in dv_vars) {
  for (y in years_offset) {
    
    col_name <- paste0(v, ifelse(y < 0, paste0("_m", abs(y)),
                          ifelse(y > 0, paste0("_p", y), "_t0")))
    
    if (y < 0) {
      data1 <- data1 %>%
        group_by(country_code) %>%
        mutate(!!col_name := lag(.data[[v]], abs(y))) %>%
        ungroup()
    } else if (y > 0) {
      data1 <- data1 %>%
        group_by(country_code) %>%
        mutate(!!col_name := lead(.data[[v]], y)) %>%
        ungroup()
    } else {
      data1 <- data1 %>%
        mutate(!!col_name := .data[[v]])
    }
  }
}

for (v in dv_vars) {
  for (y in years_offset) {
    
    col_name <- paste0(v, ifelse(y < 0, paste0("_m", abs(y)),
                          ifelse(y > 0, paste0("_p", y), "_t0")))
    
    plot_title <- paste0(dv_labels[[v]], " — ", year_labels[[as.character(y)]])
    
    p <- ggplot(data1, aes(x = points_diff,
                           y = .data[[col_name]],       
                           color = factor(treatment))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = seq(min(data1$points_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
                     max(data1$points_diff, na.rm = TRUE), by = 1)
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("0" = "red", "1" = "blue"),
        labels = c("Non-qualifier", "Qualifier"),
        name   = "Group"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = plot_title,
        x     = "Points Margin",
        y     = dv_labels[[v]]
      ) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    
    print(p) 
    
    # Optional: save each plot
    # ggsave(paste0("rdd_", v, "_", y, "y.pdf"), p, width = 8, height = 5)
  }
}
```

## Manipulation? 
```{r}

ggplot(data, aes(x = points_diff)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, color = "black", fill = "grey70") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(data$points_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
                                max(data$points_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
                                by = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Running variable (margin)",
    y = "Frequency",
    title = "Manipulation Check") +
  theme_bw()

```

## Cool Graph
```{r}
data <- data_more_balanced_1

# MOYENNES (plus interprétable si groupes de tailles différentes)
milex_d1 <- apply(data[data$treatment == 1, c("milex5yb", "milex3yb", "milex1yb", "milex", "milex1ya", "milex3ya", "milex5ya")], 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
milex_d0 <- apply(data[data$treatment == 0, c("milex5yb", "milex3yb", "milex1yb", "milex", "milex1ya", "milex3ya", "milex5ya")], 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)

Year <- c(-5, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, 5)

tsdata <- data.frame(Year = Year, milex_d1 = milex_d1, milex_d0 = milex_d0)

ggplot(tsdata, aes(x = Year)) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = milex_d1), colour = "green4", linewidth = 1.2) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = milex_d0), colour = "red3", linewidth = 1.2) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 1, color = "black") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) + 
  annotate("text", x = -0.3, y = max(c(milex_d1, milex_d0), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95, 
           angle = 90, label = "Qualification", size = 3.5, color = "red") + 
  labs(title = "Military Expenditure Around World Cup Qualification",
       subtitle = "Average military spending: qualifiers vs non-qualifiers") + 
  ylab("Military Expenditure (% of GDP) - Mean per Group") + 
  xlab("Years Since Qualification") + 
  scale_fill_manual(name = "", values = "lightblue") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = Year, labels = Year)

```
